name: Layered Banana Pineapple Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 can Dole Crushed Pineapple, drained (20 oz)
1 package Cool Whip Whipped Topping, thawed (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the graham cracker crust by mixing together the Graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine in a 13x9-inch pan. Press evenly onto the bottom of the pan.
2. Arrange banana slices on top of the crust.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth using a wire whisk.
4. Gradually add milk to the cream cheese mixture and continue beating until well blended.
5. Mix in the Jell-O Vanilla Flavor Instant Pudding & Pie Filling according to package instructions.
6. Spread the pudding mixture evenly over the banana slices.
7. Spoon the drained Dole Crushed Pineapple evenly over the top of the pudding layer.
8. Spread the Cool Whip Whipped Topping evenly over the pineapple.
9. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until ready to serve.
